Xmas Cookie Clicker

Ho Ho Ho! It's the most wonderful time of the year! Start kneading the dough; everybody is waiting for their Christmas cookies. This is a job requiring speed.

Play Xmas Cookie Clicker Online

Loading game...
About Xmas Cookie Clicker

Ho Ho Ho! It's the most wonderful time of the year! Start kneading the dough; everybody is waiting for their Christmas cookies. This is a job requiring speed. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Xmas Cookie Clicker in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Clicker game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Xmas Cookie Clicker for free?

Yes. Xmas Cookie Clicker is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Xmas Cookie Clicker?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
